latest_evidence.single_day_scope_limit: same day and same condition; useful tooling proof but not enough breadth

selected_next_step.name: bounded_multiday_selected_action_truth_response_v1
selected_next_step.reason: The first real response validated one day and one condition only. Before adding residual FIFO or strict rescue close logic, the source-row reproducibility layer should be proven across allowed days and distinct conditions.

day_policy.target_distribution: prefer 2 actions per allowed day, from distinct conditions when available, total <=30

filters: one or two actions per day with distinct condition_id where available

replay_store_selected_lookups: md_book_l1 by day, condition_id, recv_ms <= action_ts_ms within bounded lookback
md_book_l2 by day, condition_id, side, recv_ms <= action_ts_ms within bounded lookback
md_trades before/after by day, condition_id, bounded time window

pass_fail_criteria.KEEP: all selected actions emit SOURCE_TRUTH_VALIDATED_RESEARCH_ONLY, market/L1/L2 refs are present, private_truth_ready=false, deployable=false, promotion_gate.passed=false
pass_fail_criteria.UNKNOWN: some selected actions lack required candidate fields or replay_store_v2 source rows; name missing fields/tables/conditions
pass_fail_criteria.DISCARD: replay source rows contradict selected action day/condition/time/side/fee assumptions or the run becomes broad strategy search

deferred_option.name: residual_fifo_plus_strict_rescue_close_verifier
deferred_option.reason_deferred: residual_lots is available, but strict rescue close validation needs explicit close-action timing/side/qty/cost/source linkage. The current status step should first broaden source-row validation across days and conditions.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_REPLAY_STORE_V2_MULTIDAY_SELECTED_ACTION_PLAN_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: A concrete local next target is selected: broaden replay-derived source-truth validation across allowed days and distinct selected candidate actions. This remains research-only.

next_action: Run a local causal_verifier that builds <=30 selected candidate actions across allowed days/distinct conditions, runs scripts/xuan_b27_dplus_replay_store_truth_validation_response_builder.py, and records SOURCE_TRUTH_VALIDATED_RESEARCH_ONLY or exact missing source-row gaps without using replay_store_v2 for strategy search.
